reviews.author: Pooja
reviews.body: The details are delicate, the form is traditional, and the use of pyrite adds a unique shimmer that makes it stand out in any puja space or living room.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
✨ Pyrite Ganesha Diwali Combo

Celebrate this Diwali with divine blessings and radiant energy. The Pyrite Ganesha Diwali Combo brings together the power of crystals and the grace of Lord Ganesha to create an auspicious festive aura.

This combo includes:

• 
🕯️ 1 Crystal Candle – handcrafted to spread warmth, light, and positivity in your space.

• 
🌟 Pyrite Ganesha Idol – symbolizing wisdom, prosperity, and the removal of obstacles, while radiating the protective and abundance-attracting energy of Pyrite.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Invites prosperity, wisdom, and success into your life.

Elevates the festive ambiance with divine light and crystal energy.

Acts as a beautiful centerpiece for Diwali décor and gifting.

Combines spiritual symbolism with natural crystal healing energy.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Light the crystal candle during pooja or meditation for peace and positivity.

Place the Pyrite Ganesha idol in your mandir, workspace, or living area to attract abundance and remove negativity.

Ideal as a festive gift for loved ones.
